error_string: grpc: error while marshaling: string field contains invalid UTF-8

required_files.rationale: Contains the env var expansion logic that truncates multi-byte UTF-8 characters when processing $-prefixed variable names. Root cause of the invalid UTF-8.
Test file updated in fix PR to cover the multi-byte UTF-8 edge case.

sufficient_files.rationale: Kubelet env var expansion caller — helps understand how expand.go is invoked during container creation.

error_chain: Container spec has env var with value containing $ followed by non-ASCII character
Kubelet processes container env vars via expansion/expand.go
expand.go treats $ as variable reference, truncates multi-byte UTF-8 char to get variable name
Truncated bytes produce invalid UTF-8 in the expanded string
CRI/gRPC marshaling rejects the invalid UTF-8 string
Container creation fails with 'string field contains invalid UTF-8'
trigger_conditions: Container env var value contains $ followed by a multi-byte UTF-8 character
Example: VALUE=$\xc3\xa9 (e-acute) — $ causes expansion to treat \xc3 as var name start
The variable name extraction truncates the multi-byte character
